subcodes.first_line: In all matters be thou dependent upon God, and neglect not for a single moment to exercise the utmost protection and wisdom in all affairs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع امور متوسل بحق بوده و آنی غفلت ننمائید و نهایت حفظ و حکمت در کل امور
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
